ShortDescription.Value: Fast Bikes, Scooters, and Path Speeds :)

Publish.LongDescription:
🚲 Fast Bikes: speeds up bicycles and scooters.
🚴 Path speed limit - YES - now you can change bike paths (paths are independent of road speed limits)! 🚴 Status report - compare Bike count versus Cars usage (this can be used without enabling Fast Bikes checkbox).
- road mods don't let you set "path" speeds so this is unique to this mod.
#### Features
- ✅ Speed ⬆️ ⬇️ - ✅ Smoothing math for acceleration + braking (no teleport and panic braking) - ✅ One-click Reset buttons.
#### Tech notes
- Road speed limits and game conditions may still cap speeds. - Compatible with "Road Speed Adjuster" mod (as that does normal roads and not Paths). - Path speed limit: includes both bike and pedestrian paths. - To disable the mod without uninstalling, uncheck [ ] the enable box. - Safe to remove (Reset button first for fast return to game defaults, then save city, and uninstall).
#### Support and Feedback
- If the mod helps, drop a Like, it's free + easy to do :) - Report issues on Github / Forum / Discord.
#### Design + Performance - Fast Bikes is built to be lightweight. It's partly why this was made; to have a mod that does not run in the city per-frame. - Bike/vehicle or path speed are features that can be implemented without Harmony patch or running in the city per frame. - It works to apply tuning when you change settings (or when a city loads), then goes idle, simple. - Status report refreshes only when the Options menu is open (to not affect city gameplay performance). - This is a brief idea, there is much more; be sure, effort is made for these details.
#### Credits
- **River-mochi** - author
tags: slow bike, bicycle speed, fix bike traffic, scooter, quality of life, change path speed, bike path.
Publish.ChangeLog: - Compatibility with other mods, remove sway feature. - update language files.
